title: Cave Delight
description: A compatibility addon between farmer's delight and alex's caves!
body:
Cave Delight is an addon for Alex's Caves and Farmer's Delight that adds content relating to the primordial caves!

With this mod, you now can:

Boil a shrimp alive!
Eat a billion year old bug!
Roast a whole dinosaur after reassembling its carcass with your bare hands!
Make tacos!
And more!

Currently the only cave with fd content is Primordial, but this is bound to change in the future, so stay tuned...

Alex's Caves:
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/alexs-caves

Farmer's Delight:
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/farmers-delight
